headline: Palantir CEO Alex Karp Is 'Rooting For Elon'—And Has Clients 'Screaming' About OpenAI, Anthropic
summary: Palantir Technologies CEO Alex Karp told CNBC today that enterprises that go to the big AI labs first often arrive at Palantir frustrated, revealing the company has even debated paying clients to try its rivals before signing up. “Should we...

headline: Is Rackspace Technology, Inc. (RXT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is RXT a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Rackspace Technology, Inc. on r/smallstreetbets by lumbridge12. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on RXT. Rackspace Technology, Inc.’s share was trading at $4.5100 as of June 8th. RXT’s forward P/E was 91.74 according to Yahoo Finance. Rackspace Technology, Inc. operates […]

headline: Palantir Faces Investor Human Rights Push And UK NHS Contract Scrutiny
summary: Shareholders of Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) recently backed a proposal for the company to commission a human rights report, with 56% of non-insider votes in favor. At the same time, UK regulators and politicians are increasing scrutiny of Palantir’s role in a major National Health Service contract, raising data privacy and national sovereignty concerns. Palantir, known for its data analytics platforms used by governments and enterprises, now sits at the center of a broader debate...
